home.heroDescripcion: Private parota-wood cabins, built in harmony with the tropical jungle of Riviera Nayarit, 150 meters from Sayulita's Playa Norte.
home.introTexto: 13 private cabins surrounded by endemic vegetation and a natural stream, steps from the Pacific Ocean and a 5-minute walk from Sayulita's main square.
home.seccionCabanasTexto: Five cabin styles, all designed for couples — the Treehouse admits up to 3 guests.
home.chatTexto: Selva, our booking assistant, helps you pick a cabin, get a seasonal quote, and leave your reservation request.

habitaciones.subtitulo: All cabins are designed for couples, except the Treehouse which admits up to 3 guests.
habitaciones.notaTarifas: Rates may change on special dates (Easter, New Year, Christmas). Always confirm with our team. Monthly rentals available in low and mid season — ask us on WhatsApp.

galeria.pendiente: Real photos of Casa Selva will be added soon. This is a placeholder for the gallery.

nosotros.texto1: Casa Selva Sayulita was created to offer an intimate escape into nature, steps from the Pacific Ocean.
nosotros.texto2: Our 13 parota-wood cabins were built in harmony with the tropical jungle of Riviera Nayarit, respecting the endemic trees, vegetation, and the natural stream that runs through the property.
nosotros.texto3: Sayulita is a Pueblo Mágico of Nayarit, known for its intercultural vibe, surf, food, art and biodiversity — the perfect place to experience Casa Selva.

testimonios.pendiente: No reviews loaded in this prototype yet. This section will showcase past guests' experiences.

contacto.comoLlegarTexto: 150 meters from Sayulita's Playa Norte (~2 min walk) and a 5-minute walk from the main square. The nearest airport is Puerto Vallarta International Airport (PVR), about 50 km away (45–60 min by car).

chat.placeholder: Selva, the Relevance AI booking agent, will be connected here in Phase 2 of the project.
